distinctive_elements: Unused title screen track exists in NSF (activated via RAM address $6F5 or Game Genie code PEIAZI/PESAZI)
European/Asia version has drum track sync issues with title theme
Music alternates between fast and slow in unfinished two-player mode when player nears top of playfield

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tetris (NES, Nintendo)

notes.limitations: Sources do not document specific musical parameters (tempo, key, chord progressions) for any tracks. Only technical implementation details and unused music references are available.
notes.unused_music_detail: First track in NSF file is unused, presumably intended for title screen. Game normally has silent title screen. European/Asia version exhibits drum timing issues with this track.
notes.two_player_mode_audio: Unfinished two-player mode demonstrates music system instability with alternating fast/slow playback
